Hero.subheadline: Scientific prescription, automatic periodization, strength training and financial dashboard — all in one platform built for serious coaches.

Assessorias.subheadline: No more scattered spreadsheets, lost messages and lack of control. PACERUNPRO centralizes everything you need to scale your coaching business.
Assessorias.feature1Desc: View all your athletes, level, goal, next race and payment status in a clean, organized dashboard.
Assessorias.feature2Desc: Training zones automatically calculated based on each athlete's VDOT. No spreadsheet, no errors.
Assessorias.feature3Desc: Generate training weeks with load progression, recovery and race specificity according to the target event.
Assessorias.feature4Desc: Monthly fee control, payment history and revenue metrics for your roster.

ComoFunciona.step1Desc: Import or invite your athletes. Each has a complete profile with history, goals and fitness level.
ComoFunciona.step2Desc: Enter race time or test result. The system calculates VDOT and sets training zones automatically.
ComoFunciona.step3Desc: Choose target race and preparation period. The system builds the full macrocycle with progressive volume and intensity.
ComoFunciona.step4Desc: Automatic weekly check-ins, fatigue alerts and performance reports to adjust load in real time.

Treinadores.subheadline: Scientific prescription, integrated strength training and professional reports. Everything you need to deliver results and grow.
Treinadores.tool1Desc: VDOT-based workouts with pace zones for each session type: easy, threshold, intervals and repetitions.
Treinadores.tool2Desc: Exercise library for runners with videos, progression and integration with the running plan.
Treinadores.tool3Desc: Professional performance reports to send to athletes and present results credibly.
Treinadores.tool4Desc: Automatic notifications for athletes with accumulated fatigue, no check-in or upcoming races.
Treinadores.tool5Desc: Automatic analysis of weekly athlete responses with load adjustment suggestions based on data.
Treinadores.tool6Desc: Student pipeline, monthly fee control and cancellation risk alerts to reduce churn.

Atletas.subheadline: Your training plan, race calendar and performance history in an app designed for serious runners.
Atletas.feature1Desc: Workouts prescribed by your coach with the exact pace for each zone and session type.
Atletas.feature2Desc: View your full season, scheduled races and progress of your preparation macrocycle.
Atletas.feature3Desc: VDOT evolution charts, weekly volume, CTL and fitness trend over time.
Atletas.feature4Desc: Report your perceived effort, sleep quality and energy level. Your coach receives and adjusts.

Integracoes.subheadline: Garmin, Strava, Apple Health and more. Your training data synced automatically.
Integracoes.garminDesc: Sync activities and GPS data automatically.
Integracoes.stravaDesc: Import workouts and connect with your running community.
Integracoes.appleDesc: Monitor sleep, heart rate and health metrics.

CtaFinal.subheadline: 14 days free, no credit card required. Cancel anytime.

Footer.tagline: Performance operating system for running coaches.

Pricing.subheadline: Start free. Scale as your coaching business grows. No setup fee, cancel anytime.
Pricing.paymentInfo: Pay by card or PIX · Immediate access · No setup fee
